json_data.title: Responsive Web Design Principles
json_data.reason: This topic extends the foundational understanding of layout from a fixed 2x2 table to designing interfaces that adapt seamlessly across various screen sizes and devices.

json_data.title: Component-Based UI Development with React/Vue
json_data.reason: This topic introduces modern architectural patterns for building complex and maintainable user interfaces by treating elements like buttons as reusable components.

json_data.title: Generative User Interface Design via Machine Learning
json_data.reason: This research-level topic explores how artificial intelligence can automate the creation and optimization of user interfaces, moving beyond manual design and development.
